headline: Gartner Marketing Survey Finds 50% of Consumers Prefer Brands That Avoid Using GenAI in Consumer-Facing Content
summary: STAMFORD, Conn., March 16, 2026--Half of U.S. consumers (50%) say they would prefer to give their business to brands that do not use GenAI, according to a survey by Gartner, Inc., a business and technology insights company. In this survey, "brands that use GenAI" refers to brands incorporating GenAI in consumer-facing messages, advertising and content.

headline: Gartner (IT) Valuation Check After Mixed Q4 Results And New Federal Securities Investigation
summary: Gartner (IT) is back on investor watch after its Q4 2025 earnings beat earnings per share expectations but fell short on revenue, alongside news of a fresh federal securities investigation. See our latest analysis for Gartner. The share price reaction around Q4 2025 and the subsequent federal investigation has been sharp, with a 1 day share price return of 3.89% decline, contributing to a 90 day share price return of 35.21% decline and a 1 year total shareholder return of 65.29% decline...
